phases.name: Fix Database Tests
phases.description: Fix ALL 4 failing enrollment_token_test.go tests in services/auth-service/repository/enrollment_token_test.go. Tests fail with PostgreSQL connection refused (127.0.0.1:5432). SOLUTION: Add test database setup using testcontainers or environment-aware DSN. Add setupTestDB() and teardownTestDB() helper functions. Set DATABASE_URL env var to use localhost:15432 (Docker external port) or use sqlmock for unit tests. Run: go test -v ./services/auth-service/repository/ to verify all 4 tests pass.
success_criteria: Test can run without manual DB setup

phases.name: Implement API Gateway
phases.description: Create services/gateway/main.go as API gateway routing to all microservices (ports 8001-8005). Implement HTTP reverse proxy using gorilla/mux or httputil.ReverseProxy. Create services/gateway/middleware/auth.go with JWT validation middleware extracting tokens from Authorization header. Create services/gateway/middleware/rate_limit.go using golang.org/x/time/rate with IP-based limiting (100 req/min default). Create services/gateway/middleware/audit.go logging all requests with timestamp, method, path, user_id. Expose port 8000. Run: go build ./services/gateway && verify with curl http://localhost:8000/health.

phases.name: Implement Analytics Service
phases.description: Create services/analytics-service/main.go with HTTP server on port 8006. Create services/analytics-service/handler/analytics.go with endpoints: GET /api/v1/analytics/jobs (job statistics), GET /api/v1/analytics/printers (printer usage), GET /api/v1/analytics/users (user activity). Create services/analytics-service/processor/aggregator.go with AggregateJobsByDate(), AggregateByPrinter(), AggregateByUser() functions querying PostgreSQL. Add database connection pool. Return JSON with counts, trends, breakdowns. Run: go build ./services/analytics-service && test GET /api/v1/analytics/jobs returns JSON.

phases.name: Implement Organization Service
phases.description: Create services/organization-service/main.go on port 8007. Create services/organization-service/handler/org.go with POST /api/v1/organizations (create org), GET /api/v1/organizations/:id, PUT /api/v1/organizations/:id, DELETE /api/v1/organizations/:id. Create services/organization-service/handler/permission.go with GET /api/v1/organizations/:id/permissions, POST /api/v1/organizations/:id/permissions. Create services/organization-service/repository/org.go with OrganizationRepository struct and Create(), FindByID(), Update(), Delete(), AddMember(), RemoveMember() methods. Add organizations table schema reference. Run: go build ./services/organization-service.

phases.name: Complete Frontend TODOs
phases.description: Complete 5 remaining TODO comments in web/dashboard. 1) web/dashboard/src/features/devices/Devices.tsx:149 and :249: Implement openRegisterDeviceModal() function with dialog containing device_name, location, printer_type fields, calling POST /api/v1/devices/register. 2) web/dashboard/src/pages/Printers.tsx:25: Implement handleDeletePrinter(id) with confirmation dialog calling DELETE /api/v1/printers/:id. 3) web/dashboard/src/pages/Jobs.tsx:36: Implement job selection with checkboxes in JobList and bulk actions. 4) web/dashboard/src/pages/Analytics.tsx:27: Implement groupBy dropdown (day|week|month|printer|user) updating chart aggregation. Run: cd web/dashboard && npm run type-check to verify.
success_criteria: Devices.tsx register modal opens and submits

critical_issues: 4 database connection test failures blocking test score
No API gateway - services isolated on separate ports
Frontend has 5 incomplete features marked TODO
strengths: Core services (auth, registry, job, storage) functional
Dashboard UI structure exists with 88 TSX files

rationale: Task 1 fixes test failures (10% weight) by resolving PostgreSQL connection issues - highest ROI. Task 2 implements API Gateway improving backend completeness (15% weight) and connecting all services. Task 3 implements entire Analytics service (high-value backend gap). Task 4 implements Organization service (another high-value backend gap). Task 5 completes frontend TODOs improving frontend score (15% weight). Combined, these improve test_passing, endpoints, backend_files, and frontend_files dimensions - the four lowest-weighted areas currently at 0-60%.
